src: It was significant that, when the war took a grave turn the following year, it was to every Anglican incumbent in the land (and no doubt to many others, though I can speak only for the parish clergy) that Duff Cooper, the Home Secretary, sent letters expressing apprehension of the state of public morale and urging the incumbents to do their utmost to help raise it.
mt: "Fue significativo que, cuando la guerra tomó un giro grave el año siguiente, a cada vicario anglicano en todo el país (y sin duda a muchos otros, aunque solo pueda hablar por los clérigos parroquiales) se le enviaran cartas por el Secretario del Interior, Duff Cooper, expresando su preocupación por el estado de la moral pública y urgía a los vicarios a hacer todo lo posible para ayudar a elevarla."

src: The details have escaped me, but he and Sir Andrew Clarke, as churchwardens (their memorial tablets are near to each other in the south transept) had been obliged to take legal action over the advowson — the word which, because of its precision of meaning and its sound, I could see he enjoyed introducing; but they had evidently covered themselves in so doing, because, the Anglican Church being established, their office carried official responsibilities.
mt: "Los detalles se me han escapado, pero él y Sir Andrew Clarke, como vicarios (sus lápidas conmemorativas están cerca una de la otra en el transepto sur), se habían visto obligados a tomar medidas legales sobre el advowson — el término que, debido a su precisión de significado y su sonido, podía ver que él disfrutaba introducir; sin embargo, evidentemente se habían cubierto a sí mismos al hacerlo, porque, con la Iglesia Anglicana ya establecida, su oficina llevaba responsabilidades oficiales."

src: so remember that, do when you do the bearings if you're doing some, erm examples, or you're looking through, or you're doing some revision, get up, stand up, and think, right what's to think of, oh it's not there, like if I'm taking a bearing on these flowers, it's, well, just that much in it, you know,

src: In particular, if the quantity of money is the prime determinant of aggregate demand, it follows from the analysis in chapter 4 that the predictable component of the rate of growth of the quantity of money will have no effect on any real variable such as the level of output or the level of unemployment; only the unpredictable or random component of monetary growth will affect real variables.
mt: "En particular, si la cantidad de dinero es el determinante principal de la demanda agregada, se desprende de la análisis del capítulo 4 que el componente predecible del crecimiento de la cantidad de dinero no afectará ninguna variable real como el nivel de producción o el nivel de desempleo; solo el componente impredecible o aleatorio del crecimiento monetario afectará a las variables reales."

src: There was an added difficulty that the three of then, would break into convulsions of laughter, verging on hysterics, with Hopper somewhere off camera rolling around in the bushes and, according to Nicholson, ‘totally freaked out’ while Jack was forcing himself to be relatively straight, do his serious acting and hold the whole thing together: ‘This used to be a helluva good country…’

src: Voluntary personal abstention continued in a modest way through to the end of American slavery but plans positively to develop free-labour cultivation in the American South, India or West Africa came to little in the 1850s and the British government never gave any serious consideration after equalisation of the sugar duties beginning in 1846 to a policy of discriminating in favour of free-grown produce.
mt: "El abstinencia personal voluntaria continuó modestamente hasta el final de la esclavitud americana, pero los planes para desarrollar la agricultura libre de mano en el sur de los Estados Unidos, India o África Occidental no tuvieron mucho éxito en la década de 1850, y el gobierno británico nunca dio ninguna consideración seria después de la igualación de las tasas de azúcar en 1846 a una política de discriminación a favor de los productos cultivados libremente."

src: To make this connection is to perform role (or role-to-role) mapping.
mt: "Para hacer esta conexión es realizar la mapeo de roles (o mapeo de roles a roles)."

src: Where a solicitor realises himself that he has been negligent or his client makes a claim against him on that ground, the client must be told of the circumstances (if he is not already aware of them) and be advised to seek independent advice.
mt: "Donde un abogado se da cuenta de que ha sido negligente o su cliente lo demanda por esa razón, el cliente debe ser informado de las circunstancias (si no está ya al tanto de ellas) y aconsejado para buscar asesoramiento independiente."

src: If the court can spell out an implied agreement that all parties recognised that the continuing partners would be entitled to carry on the practice after the departure of an outgoing partner, the right to a full dissolution will not be available, but the outgoing partner will have the benefit of s43 of the Act and the continuing partners will, after all necessary accounts and inquiries have been taken, be obliged to pay him the value of his interest in the firm—see Sobell v Boston [1975]1 WLR 1587.
mt: "Si el tribunal puede delinear un acuerdo implícito que todas las partes reconocieran que los socios continuos tendrían derecho a continuar la práctica después del partida de un socio saliente, el derecho a una disolución completa no estará disponible, pero el socio saliente tendrá derecho a los beneficios de la s43 del Acta, y los socios continuos, después de que se hayan tomado las cuentas y las investigaciones necesarias, deberán pagarle el valor de su interés en la firma—ver Sobell v Boston [1975]1 WLR 1587."

src: Those musical orbits described by the fertile planets of Loose Tubes and the Jazz Warriors dominated the polls, with Andy Sheppard continuing to make his individual mark as he has in the past two years.
mt: "Los órbitas musicales descritas por los planetas fértiles de Loose Tubes y los Jazz Warriors dominaron las encuestas, con Andy Sheppard continuando a dejar su marca individual como lo ha hecho en los últimos dos años."

src: There is a growing trend in the textile trade for designers to make use of computer-aided design, in order to explore a greater number of design ideas and to shorten lead times on production.
mt: "Hay un creciente movimiento en el comercio textil para que los diseñadores utilicen la diseño asistido por computadora, con el fin de explorar un mayor número de ideas de diseño y reducir los tiempos de producción."

src: Fifteen companies combined last week to make a single joint submission to the Object Management Group in its quest for Object Services, its first such Request For Technology (UX No 420).
mt: "Diecisiete empresas se unieron la semana pasada para hacer una única presentación conjunta a la Object Management Group en su búsqueda de Servicios de Objeto, su primera Solicitud de Tecnología (UX No 420)." Note: The translation maintains the original meaning and context, using idiomatic expressions where appropriate. The term "Request For Technology" is translated as "Solicitud de Tecnología," which is a common way to refer to such a request in Spanish. The term "Object Services" is translated as "Servicios de Objeto," which is a direct translation and commonly used in the context of software development and technology. The term "Object Management Group" remains the same as it is the name of an organization and does not have a direct translation. The term "joint submission" is translated as "una única presentación conjunta," which conveys the idea of a single combined effort. The term "quest" is translated as "búsqueda," which is a common term used in Spanish to refer to a search

src: I've got a meeting so I'll be staying late.

src: Even so, Galileo had many topics on his mind and was not solely doing astronomical research, so that the priority of a month or so could have been true.

src: That is, there is that which is common, or of one kind, in each of the experiences of feeling a sensation, being depressed, thinking a question, taking a decision, and so on .

src: The usual way of coping with their father had been to make no reference to anything untoward that might have happened, for fear of bringing it all upon them again.

src: (b) On termination by the Buyer in accordance with clause (a) the following provisions shall have effect:(i) all sums payable by the Buyer under the contract cease to be payable;(ii) the Seller must repay to the Buyer all sums paid by the Buyer prior to termination; and (iii) the Buyer is entitled to recover damages from the Seller in respect of any losses caused to the Buyer as a result of the Seller's failure to make delivery or as a result of the termination of the contract.
mt: "(b) En caso de terminación por parte del Comprador de acuerdo con la cláusula (a), las siguientes disposiciones entrarán en vigor:(i) todas las cantidades que el Comprador debe pagar bajo el contrato cesarán de ser pagadas;(ii) el Vendedor debe devolver al Comprador todas las cantidades pagadas por el Comprador antes de la terminación; y (iii) el Comprador tiene derecho a recuperar daños del Vendedor en relación con cualquier pérdida causada al Comprador como resultado del incumplimiento del Vendedor para hacer entrega o como resultado de la terminación del contrato."

src: Where there are no established rules to guide decision we must make a direct judgement as to what will have the best consequences, concentrating on the more immediate and those we are personally most motivated to promote, as the remote future is highly unpredictable and we are unlikely to do much to promote what is not personally inviting.

src: 306, the Court of Appeal had held that a trade association which by its constitution had power to put the name of a person infringing its rules on a stop list, could instead lawfully ask the person concerned to make a money payment by way of compromise.

src: Moreover, why did the promisor make the promise if it was to have no legal effect?
mt: Además, ¿por qué el promisor hizo la promesa si era para que tuviera ningún efecto legal?

src: In Kennedy v. Broun (1863) 13 C.B. 677 (Common Pleas) Erle C.J. said that in Lampleigh v. Brathwait, ‘it was assumed that the journeys which the plaintiff performed at the request of the defendant, and the other services he rendered, would have been sufficient to make any promise binding if it had been connected therewith in one contract; the peculiarity of the decision lies in connecting a subsequent promise with a prior consideration after it had been executed.
mt: En Kennedy v. Broun (1863) 13 C.B. 677 (Common Pleas) Erle C.J. dijo que en Lampleigh v. Brathwait, 'se asumía que las viajes que el demandante realizó a petición del demandado, y los otros servicios que prestó, habrían sido suficientes para hacer vinculante cualquier promesa si se hubiera conectado con ella en un solo contrato; la particularidad de la decisión radica en conectar una promesa posterior con una consideración previa después de haberse ejecutado.'

src: These authorities suggest that a promise to pay money, or to do any other act, in a certain event but without any express or implied request to the promisee to bring about, or to promise to bring about, that event, is made without consideration.
mt: "Estas autoridades sugieren que un compromiso a pagar dinero, o a realizar cualquier otra acción, en un evento específico pero sin ninguna solicitud expresa o implícita al prometedor para que provoque, o prometa provocar, ese evento, se hace sin consideración."

src: In broad terms, because soft systems thinking represents a unique way of encouraging an observer to learn about a situation, it should appeal to virtually anyone who has an enquiring mind, a notion reflected in the closing paragraphs of Systems Thinking, Systems practice ; as I have made frequent reference to this work throughout, it seems appropriate to finish my book with the following quote from Professor Peter Checkland, who says about soft systems thinking:
mt: "En términos generales, porque el pensamiento de sistemas suaves representa una manera única de animar a un observador a aprender sobre una situación, debería atraer a prácticamente a cualquier persona que tenga un espíritu inquisitivo, una noción reflejada en los párrafos finales de 'Pensamiento de Sistemas, Práctica de Sistemas'; como he hecho referencia a este trabajo con frecuencia, parece apropiado terminar mi libro con el siguientequote del Profesor Peter Checkland, quien dice sobre el pensamiento de sistemas suaves:"

src: I'd go down through the choir practice room and St Andrew's chapel beneath it, make a quick call at the sacristy (where Holy Harding does his serving), then cross the quire to the south side, where, with the help of the Talisman of Shag, I would enter the-spiral stair at ground level, and so — relicless but, hopefully, bearing precious manna for the invalid — to the Sanatorium (formerly known as the Wheel Room) and, after that, bed.

src: The possibility that a dichotic right ear superiority is due to subjects being required to give a verbal response prompted Springer (1971, 1973) to present consonant-vowel syllables either dichotically or opposed by white noise (a mixture of all possible sound frequencies) and to use manual reaction time to a target syllable as her response measure.
mt: "La posibilidad de que una superioridad del oído derecho en dicotomas esté debida a que los sujetos estén obligados a dar una respuesta verbal incitó a Springer (1971, 1973) a presentar sílabas consonánticas-vocálicas dicotomas o opuestas por ruido blanco (una mezcla de todas las frecuencias posibles de sonido) y a utilizar el tiempo de reacción manual a una sílaba de objetivo como su medida de respuesta."

src: Even in the northern counties, Scottish raids were never as frequent or as deeply penetrating as they had been in Edward II's reign, and although the inhabitants of those counties made the most of their plight in petitions for relief from taxation, the raids in the years after 1332 did little long-term damage to the region's economy.
mt: Incluso en los condados del norte, las incursiones escocesas nunca fueron tan frecuentes ni tan profundas como lo habían sido durante el reinado de Eduardo II, y aunque los habitantes de esos condados aprovecharon al máximo su situación en peticiones de alivio fiscal, las incursiones en los años posteriores a 1332 no causaron daños económicos duraderos a la región.

src: Exhibitors also complain they have to put up with the theft of their merchandise, and suspect their bills are inflated by ‘ghost’ workers, who are paid but do no work.

src: This figurine, aptly nicknamed ‘The Poppy Goddess’, dates from about 1350 BC and makes a clear connection between the manifestation of the deity and the taking of opium.

src: Psycho-history no doubt has its value, and can often provide valuable insights, but its major difficulty (the opposite of the naturalistic problem) is that by and large theoretical constructs take precedence over empirical evidence.

src: Among the Tchambuli, yet further variation occurred: men adorned themselves, gossiped, made things for trade, while women selected their partners, made the sexual advances, did all the trade, and were the more aggressive sex.
mt: "Entre los Tchambuli, ocurrió una variación aún mayor: los hombres se vestían, charlaban, hacían cosas para el comercio, mientras que las mujeres elegían a sus parejas, hacían los avances sexuales, realizaban todo el comercio y eran la especie más agresiva."

src: Such brief ‘thumb-nail’ sketches do give some indication of the essence of sociology, but ultimately it is both necessary and perhaps more fruitful to emphasise that the most important and distinctive feature of sociology is not so much what is studied but how it is studied, i.e. it is important to indicate what is the particular perspective of sociology, its distinct way of looking at the individual and society.
mt: "Estas breves 'dibujos de pulgar' dan alguna indicación de la esencia de la sociología, pero en última instancia es necesario y quizás más fructífero enfatizar que la característica más importante y distintiva de la sociología no es tanto lo que se estudia, sino cómo se estudia, es decir, es importante señalar la perspectiva particular de la sociología, su manera única de mirar al individuo y la sociedad."

src: Andy took a deep breath and patted my head, chuckling.

mt: "Dos de sus obras más conocidas, la puesta en escena sin acompañamiento de 'At the Round Earth's Imagin'd Corners' de Donne y las 'Poemas del Mar de los Siete' para solista, coro, oboe y cuerdas, datan de la mitad de los años 1950, siendo la última una fuerte impresión durante el Festival de la Ciudad de Londres de 1968."

src: Secret When the children are looking at their cards tell them to take one last look.

src: This would, in fact, make an ideal introduction to the works, were it not for the fact that the packaging completely misleads the purchaser as to the playing order of the music: it is listed as (in order)— but the disc actually plays , so that there's not a single track which corresponds with the one listed in the sleeve note!

src: In a letter to the Stanford committee on research, the faculty said: ‘For years we have been able to tell visiting school children, student, engineers, scientists, laymen and the press that we are here to do basic research on the fundamental properties of matter and that we do not do any military work.
mt: En una carta al comité de investigación de Stanford, la facultad dijo: "Por años hemos podido contar a niños escolares visitantes, estudiantes, ingenieros, científicos, laicos y la prensa que estamos aquí para realizar investigaciones básicas sobre las propiedades fundamentales de la materia y que no realizamos ningún trabajo militar."

src: The choice of reference, whether it is to be to expert or arbitrator, is in any event usually made at the time of the original contract which precedes the time when the parties know whether they have an "issue to settle" or a "formulated dispute" , and they will be obliged to use whatever procedure was stipulated, unless they make some fresh agreement.
mt: "El elección del referente, ya sea que sea un experto o árbitro, generalmente se toma en cualquier caso en el momento de la original contrato, que precede al momento en que las partes conocen si tienen un "asunto a resolver" o un "disputa formulada", y estarán obligadas a utilizar el procedimiento estipulado, a menos que hagan algún acuerdo nuevo."

src: This was made very clear to me early in my fieldwork when I offended a neighbour by trying to make explicit return of food that had been given to my wife and me.

src: Compact-disc video makes its entry into the British marketplace during October, but punters generally can't afford any new format because they are buying the various versions of singles that are deluging the record shops.
mt: "El video en disco compacta hace su entrada en el mercado británico en octubre, pero en general, los consumidores no pueden permitirse ningún nuevo formato ya que están comprando las diversas versiones de sencillos que inundan las tiendas de discos."

mt: "sí, supongo que habrá porque todavía tenemos ambiciones para liberar un montón de espacio, así que sería aconsejable re-fabricar para liberar más espacio. Tenemos otros 26 pequeños almacenes que aún no hemos hecho nada excepto poner un poco de espacio, así que sí, tendremos un programa continuo de re-fabricación. No puedo darte los detalles exactos porque, ¿cuántos será? Pero definitivamente habrá un programa continuo de re-fabricación."

src: And the dozy town went about its lethargic business, rarely taking much notice of the oh-so-ordinary little girl in her gingham skirts and plaits.
mt: "Y la perezosa aldea se ocupaba de su negocio lento, rara vez prestando atención a la tan ordinaria niña en su falda de gingham y su peinado."

src: She was able to give a good account of herself and was reasonably cheerful during the interview, except when she talked about her boyfriend and about the distress she had caused her parents.

src: His Lordship must needs give consent.
mt: Su Señoría debe de dar su consentimiento.

src: When we want to make a muscle contract the brain sends a nerve impulse through the spinal chord, into the peripheral nerves and out along those nerves to the muscle and each individual muscle fibre has a single junction, a nerve muscle junction, where the nerve makes contact with the muscle, and that is the site at which the stimulus leads to muscle contraction.
mt: "Cuando queremos hacer que un músculo se contraiga, el cerebro envía una impulsión nerviosa a través de la médula espinal, hacia las nervios periféricos y luego a lo largo de esos nervios hasta el músculo. Cada fibra muscular individual tiene un solo punto de unión, un punto de unión nervio-músculo, donde el nervio hace contacto con el músculo, y ese es el sitio en el que la estimulación lleva a la contracción muscular."

src: In Britain the defence of the country has been left for centuries to a Navy which did its work out of sight.
mt: "En Gran Bretaña, la defensa del país ha sido dejada por siglos a una Marina que realizaba su trabajo fuera de la vista."

src: She had her hand on the door, but, before she could follow through her intention to slam it in his face, Naylor gave a mighty roar of utter outrage.
mt: "Tiró la mano sobre la puerta, pero antes de que pudiera seguir con su intención de cerrarla con fuerza en su cara, Naylor rugió con una ira abrumadora."

src: They use four pumping stations and move their equipment around Whiteface Mountain to make maximum use of 60 snowmaking guns.

src: One outcome of this ‘natural’ affinity was that newspaper editorial offices and political parties were often populated by the same people; newspapers were sometimes funded by political parties and, in line with their ‘freedom to make a political choice’, they espoused certain political ideologies.
mt: "Una consecuencia de esta afinidad ‘natural’ fue que las oficinas editoriales de los periódicos y los partidos políticos a menudo estaban pobladas por las mismas personas; los periódicos a veces eran financiados por los partidos políticos y, en línea con su ‘libertad de hacer una elección política’, defendían ciertas ideologías políticas."

src: It seeks to give fair coverage to all political viewpoints and to treat all views with a degree of respect not always found in other serious newspapers.

src: Elite theory accounts of state organization are developed and detailed, and we first review five aspects where the approach has made a distinctive contribution: the role of political leaderships in liberal democracies, the predominance of bureaucracies in shaping policy-making, the reasons for fragmentation (or centralization) of governmental tiers and sectors, the role of law, and the strong policy connections between government activities and major economic interests.
mt: "Las teorías elitistas sobre la organización del estado se desarrollan y detallan, y primero revisamos cinco aspectos donde el enfoque ha hecho una contribución distintiva: el papel de los liderazgos políticos en las democracias liberales, la predominancia de los burocracias en la formación de la toma de decisiones políticas, las razones para la fragmentación (o centralización) de las capas y sectores gubernamentales, el papel de la ley, y las fuertes conexiones de política entre las actividades gubernamentales y los intereses económicos principales."

src: In the eighteen months since Mrs Thatcher had taken up employment at Dickins and Jones, the mood of the Party had perceptibly changed for the better, the great bulk of the membership having transferred its loyalty smoothly from the old Leader to the new.
mt: "En los dieciocho meses desde que la Sra. Thatcher asumió empleo en Dickins y Jones, el ánimo del Partido había cambiado perceptiblemente para mejor, la gran mayoría de los miembros habiendo transferido su lealtad de manera fluida del viejo Líder a el nuevo."

src: There was an intensified sense of a gap between present and past, and of the need to find a way of bridging it which would make possible an adequate statement of belief for the present day.
mt: Había un sentido intensificado de la brecha entre el presente y el pasado, y de la necesidad de encontrar una manera de superarla que permitiera una declaración adecuada de creencia para el día de hoy.

src: The essence of regulation is a conception that law is the means by which some notion of the public good is to take precedence over narrow economic interests.
mt: "La esencia de la regulación es la concepción de que la ley es el medio a través del cual una noción de bien público debe prevalecer sobre intereses económicos estrechos."

src: It makes particular use of the work of scholars who have conducted ethnographic analyses of discretionary behaviour in legal settings (e.g. Cicourel, 1968; Emerson, 1969; Manning, 1977; Reiss, 1971; Ross, 1970; Skolnick, 1966; Sudnow, 1965).
mt: "Se hace particular uso del trabajo de académicos que han realizado análisis etnográficos del comportamiento discrecional en entornos legales (por ejemplo, Cicourel, 1968; Emerson, 1969; Manning, 1977; Reiss, 1971; Ross, 1970; Skolnick, 1966; Sudnow, 1965)."

src: It seemed unlikely that anyone so competent as Dora would make such an elementary mistake, but under that fierce gaze Melissa felt bound to make some suggestion, however implausible.

mt: Finalmente, la nueva clase trabajadora no tenía interés en una nación separada; sus aliados naturales eran los trabajadores de Petrogrado, Moscú y otras ciudades del imperio.

src: Internationalism required that two thoroughly nationalistic and non-socialist movements be given complete support.
mt: "El internacionalismo exigía que dos movimientos nacionalistas y no socialistas, pero profundamente nacionalistas, recibieran un completo apoyo."

src: From her reclining position, Mrs Keith still took a controlling interest in the household, but with only Jim in the house and two farmhands in the hut, Tina had become used to being in charge.
mt: "Desde su posición reclinada, la Sra. Keith aún mantenía un interés controlador en la casa, pero con solo Jim en la casa y dos trabajadores agrícolas en la cabaña, Tina se había acostumbrado a estar a cargo."

src: And the Aussies cheered, daring the policemen to make a move.

src: Hardly a word out of her, even when the curate, Father Mooney, insisted on making a speech to the company, and him hardly knowing Den at all.

src: It all made sense, the relationship between non-Aristotelian logic and the banality of the American way of life: you had to take a detached view of the culture; you weren't in love with it and you didn't hate it.
mt: "Todo tenía sentido, la relación entre la lógica no aristotélica y la banalidad de la vida estadounidense: tenías que tener una visión desapegada de la cultura; no estabas enamorado de ella y no la odiabas."

src: Ever since the time of Jean-Jacques Rousseau there has been art whose aim has been the renewal of society, but it has had no effect beyond that of producing testimonials (even if controversial ones) of what we call the ‘real’ world, in contrast perhaps with the unreal world of art.
mt: "Desde la época de Jean-Jacques Rousseau, ha habido arte cuyo objetivo ha sido la renovación de la sociedad, pero no ha tenido ningún efecto más allá de producir testimonios (aunque controversiales) de lo que llamamos el 'mundo real', en contraste quizás con el mundo ficticio del arte."

src: Further, authorisation to give permission may well be outside their terms of reference.
mt: "Además, la autorización para otorgar permiso puede estar bien fuera de sus términos de referencia."

src: We did an interview and, at the whim of my sadistic cameraman, it was agreed that I should be the "victim" .
mt: "Hemos hecho una entrevista y, a la capricho de mi cansado camarógrafo, se acordó que debería ser la "víctima"."

src: He did his own research before the programme went out.
mt: "Hizo su propia investigación antes de que el programa saliera al aire."

src: Neurones are of three kinds: in sensory neurones the dendrites make contact with a sensory cell, such as a hair cell in the ear or a light-sensitive cell in the retina; in motor neurones, the axons make contact with a muscle fibre; finally, most neurones in the brain make contact only with other neurones.
mt: "Los neuronas se dividen en tres tipos: en los neuronas sensoriales, los dendritas hacen contacto con una célula sensorial, como una célula de cabello en el oído o una célula sensible a la luz en la retina; en los neuronas motores, los axones hacen contacto con un fibrilador muscular; finalmente, la mayoría de los neuronas en el cerebro hacen contacto solo con otros neuronas."

src: The blunt statement and Ulster accent made an immediate impact.
mt: "La declaración directa y el acento de Ulster causaron un impacto inmediato."

src: It was Diane who proposed that they should go over and take a look at the labs where Jenner had worked and Reynolds agreed, more than a little relieved that they were returning to the main subject; he was made uncomfortable by Diane's self revelation and the way in which it had begun to erode his easy preconceptions of her and her ‘type’.
mt: "Fue Diane quien propuso que revisáramos y examináramos los laboratorios donde Jenner trabajó y Reynolds estuvo de acuerdo, más que un poco aliviado de que pudieran volver al tema principal; se sintió incómodo por la revelación de sí misma de Diane y por la forma en que esto comenzó a erosionar sus cómodas suposiciones sobre ella y su 'tipo'."

src: Tomorrow he would have to make a visit to Penrith to get himself fixed up with some more appropriate clothing for this unsympathetic and unreasonable patch of country.
mt: "El día después tendría que hacer una visita a Penrith para arreglarse con ropa más adecuada para este poco simpático y poco razonable pedazo de tierra."

src: ‘My unit's a special unit, we do very special work.
mt: "‘Mi unidad es una unidad especial, hacemos un trabajo muy especial.'" In this translation, I have maintained the idiomatic expression "un trabajo muy especial" to convey the original meaning of "very special work."

src: Er around this period we have the widespread use of things like colour television which has now started to appear in everybody's homes and the beginnings of various holiday programmes.

src: I must say that I am happy to make that statement and in view of some of the things that have been, that have appeared in the media recently here's a statement that needs to be made as for your your your ques , what the, the Chief Constable I welcome the statement and the actions of the Chief Constable on this very concerning issue.

src: It's worth mentioning too, that during the year, er, Dr Tim , the general practitioner, who is seconded with er, Social Services, has been doing work on hospital discharge, making sure that the arrangements are, are working, and his reports have been picked up by the respective authorities, and, er, there has er, a sort of action plan has been put together, which is, which is intended to try to improve the er, existing hospital discharge arr arrangement, making sure that people are discharged from hospital and that the er, right type of care is available for them in, in the community.

src: In the minds of those who gave positive thought to it, the Commonwealth was to be an organization to which no one who was unwilling need apply, and in which those who had joined were to reach their decisions on the basis of consensus: the goal to be pursued was an uncoerced acknowledgement of Britain as the senior partner in a world-wide enterprise; the position to be sought was the supremely equivocal but potentially supreme satisfying one of primus inter pares .
mt: En la mente de aquellos que dieron un pensamiento positivo a ello, la Commonwealth debía ser una organización a la cual nadie que fuera reacio no necesitara aplicar, y en la que aquellos que se habían unido tomarían sus decisiones en base a la consenso: el objetivo a perseguir era un reconocimiento no coaccionado de Gran Bretaña como la socia principal en una empresa mundial; la posición a buscar era la suprema pero potencialmente satisfactoria de primus inter pares.

src: Certainly the picture of him during this period is of a man haunted by guilt and remorse; it seems that he felt he had no right to happiness, and the death of his wife had only served to convince him that he had done some irreparable harm to another human being, for which he must undergo a period of punishment.
mt: "Sin duda, la imagen de él durante este período es de un hombre atormentado por culpa y remordimiento; parece que se sentía que no tenía derecho a la felicidad, y la muerte de su esposa solo lo convenció de que había hecho algún daño irreparable a otra persona, por lo que debía pasar por un período de castigo."

src: By providing Japan with the opportunity to save face and make an orderly withdrawal from drift-net fishing, the UN Second Committee bound them into a commitment to cease drift-net operations in the near future — an astonishing achievement for a campaign which had only really gathered momentum 10 months earlier, with the sinking of the Sankichi Maru .

src: In large-scale national surveys, as carried out regularly by market research firms and government agencies, interviews may be carried out over the whole country and the people who have the task of making the analysis of several hundred or thousand schedules cannot possibly be for ever phoning through to the interviewers to ask what some cryptic little scribble opposite question number 15 is supposed to mean.
mt: "En grandes encuestas nacionales, como se realizan regularmente por las firmas de investigación de mercado y las agencias gubernamentales, las entrevistas pueden llevarse a cabo en todo el país y los encargados de analizar cientos o miles de hojas de respuesta no pueden, de ninguna manera, estar llamando constantemente a los entrevistadores para preguntar qué significa esa pequeña y enigmática anotación al lado del número de pregunta 15."

src: A woman spends many years charring in Cremona; she saves all her money to buy an apartment for her son when he gets married; her no-good husband, the boy's father, reappears after years and demands assistance; she refuses; when the son is engaged, she relents and negotiates subsidies to her ex-husband, for a suit, a car, a wedding-present; she organizes a big reception to which she invites all her former employers; nobody comes except a tennis-star; there is no sign of the husband; her lawyer tells her that the girl her son is marrying is her husband's mistress and that he had already taken over the apartment; she reflects a moment and decides to carry on with the reception, everything is all right, ‘if no one notices anything, it is as though nothing has happened’; passers-by are invited to join the wedding-party, which they happily do because the tennis-star is present; the husband turns up in his new car; no one takes any notice of him because no one knows who he is, except for the dealer he sometimes does jobs for, who tells him all new cars lose half their value as soon as they are bought and end up on the scrapheap anyway.
mt: "Una mujer pasa muchos años en Cremona, quemándose; ahorra todo su dinero para comprar un apartamento para su hijo cuando se case; su marido, un hombre de mala reputación, el padre del niño, reaparece después de años y exige ayuda; ella se niega; cuando el hijo se casa, se relaja y negocia subsidios para su exmarido, para un traje, un coche, un regalo de boda; organiza una gran recepción a la que invita a todos sus antiguos empleadores; nadie viene excepto un estrella de tenis; no hay rastro del marido; su abogado le dice que la chica a la que se casa su hijo es la amante de su marido y que ya había tomado el apartamento; reflexiona un momento y decide continuar con la recepción, todo está bien, 'si nadie nota nada, es como si nada hubiera pasado'; invita a los transeúntes a unirse al grupo de boda, lo cual hacen felizmente porque hay una

src: So often the push is in the opposite direction, to doing research which doesn't involve one in long-term contact with the schools and this, of course, is one of the reasons why this type of research isn't so often done, but I hope to do some more work in classrooms, yes.
mt: "Así a menudo el impulso es en la dirección opuesta, hacia la investigación que no implica un contacto prolongado con las escuelas, y, por supuesto, esto es uno de los motivos por los cuales este tipo de investigación no se realiza con tanta frecuencia, pero espero poder hacer más trabajo en las aulas, sí."

src: Carol, you've been doing some research into women and education.
mt: Carola, has estado investigando sobre mujeres y educación.

src: Really we still know very little about what teachers actually do in the classroom and it's all very well standing back in university and saying teachers should do this and should do that, but in order to be able to offer guidance I think we really need to do more research in mixed ability classrooms to discover how teachers at the moment are dealing with the situation and where we might offer them more support, and that's the direction I'd like to see research going; rather than more of the grandiose large-scale quantitative studies, which collect lots of figures and statistics, I'd like to see a lot more studies in actual classrooms looking at actual teachers teaching, looking at what they do and how we can improve that.
mt: Realmente todavía sabemos muy poco sobre lo que hacen realmente los profesores en la clase y es todo muy bien desde la universidad y decirles que deberían hacer esto y deberían hacer aquello, pero para poder ofrecerles orientación creo que realmente necesitamos hacer más investigación en aulas mixtas para descubrir cómo los profesores en este momento están manejando la situación y dónde podemos ofrecerles más apoyo, y eso es la dirección en la que me gustaría ver que vaya la investigación; en lugar de más de los estudios cuantitativos de gran escala, que recopilan muchos números y estadísticas, me gustaría ver muchos más estudios en aulas reales, observando a los profesores en acción, estudiando lo que hacen y cómo podemos mejorar eso.

src: The company claims that customers say that they want to do their development at the workgroup level in an open systems environment, on a range of hardware and under different operating systems, and to share data in a decentralised development environment, rather than have it all tied to the Repository on the mainframe server.

src: For if a garage habitually does half the service its costs are very much lower than if it has done the full service; and since it can charge the full price, because of the ignorance of the consumer, its pro fits are maximised when it does as little of the service as it can get away with.
mt: "Si un garaje realiza habitualmente solo la mitad del servicio, sus costos son mucho más bajos que si lo hubiera hecho todo; y dado que puede cobrar el precio completo debido a la ignorancia del consumidor, sus beneficios se maximizan cuando hace lo mínimo posible del servicio."

src: It is interesting to make the obvious observation that, while the first and last named are fanatical behaviourists, believing that everything is subject to unlimited moulding and rearrangement through a process of reward and punishment, the three in the middle are fanatical instinctivists, insisting that virtually everything and anything is inherited, a gift (or a grief) of the genes and not subject to the environment.
mt: "Es interesante notar la observación obvia de que, si bien los primeros y últimos nombrados son fanáticos del comportamiento, creyendo que todo está sujeto a una moldeación y reordenamiento ilimitados a través de un proceso de recompensa y castigo, los tres en el medio son fanáticos del instinto, insistiendo en que prácticamente todo y cualquier cosa es heredado, un regalo (o un pesar) de los genes y no sujeto al entorno."

src: Basquiat's work is also getting unprecedented praise, at least in the Whitney catalogue, where six essays compare the one-time graffiti artist who died of a heroin overdose at the age of twenty-seven to Leonardo da Vinci, Goya, Vincent van Gogh, and Jackson Pollock.

src: (It may be objected that I am taking far too earnest a view of a wonderfully comic fictional character.

src: As we have seen, there may be cultural barriers to such reading, but leaving aside that potential difficulty, we invite the student to make a unique, personal response to the text, to tune in to the true voice of feeling, to participate in its expressiveness; in short, to have an aesthetic experience.
mt: "Como hemos visto, puede haber barreras culturales para tal lectura, pero dejando de lado esa posible dificultad, invitamos al estudiante a hacer una respuesta única y personal al texto, a escuchar la verdadera voz del sentimiento, a participar en su expresividad; en resumen, a tener una experiencia estética."

src: She addressed a group of clergy from the Diocese, sharing with them her experiences of bereavement as a religious, a hospital chaplain, a nurse, and also someone who has done research into the needs of the bereaved.

src: I belonged to them in the sense that when I was interested in something I tried to understand it as far as possible and, of course, even tried to make use of it.

src: Occasionally, a student — perhaps in mathematics or logic — can be seen actually to make a contribution to the research literature, but that is so rare as to appear precocious.
mt: "De vez en cuando, un estudiante — tal vez en matemáticas o lógica — puede verse contribuyendo realmente al cuerpo de literatura de investigación, pero eso es tan raro que parece precoz."

src: Put this analogy into the teaching situation, where the argument often runs that the teacher in higher education should not just be doing research, but that that research should be brought into the curriculum.
mt: Ponte esta analogía en la situación de enseñanza, donde a menudo se argumenta que el profesor en la educación superior no solo debe estar realizando investigaciones, sino que esas investigaciones también deben integrarse en el currículo.

src: Obviously we do not want to be in two minds up to the last day and he wouldn't do that but there is quite a a period of discretion where the time gets shorter and er he would have to make a judgement.

src: We welcome people from every party, it doesn't really matter which party, or even if they belong to no party, who are just committed to seeing a representative representation, seeing more women in there, because women in this country, just as a matter of fact, have a rather different experience from most men, and if you're making a decision then you want there the people who have had a wide range of experience, who can bring that experience to bear on making the decision.
mt: "Bienvenidos a todos, no importa a qué partido pertenezcan, ni siquiera si no pertenecen a ningún partido, siempre y cuando estén comprometidos a ver una representación representativa, más mujeres en él, porque las mujeres en este país, de hecho, tienen una experiencia bastante diferente a la de la mayoría de los hombres, y si estás tomando una decisión, quieres que estén allí las personas que han tenido una amplia gama de experiencias, que puedan aportar esa experiencia a la toma de la decisión."

src: I suppose well my children would say my answer to everything is to say to them breathe, you know, and erm you know just do very simple relaxation if nothing else, and then that allows you maybe to start looking at other things, but to get to the state where you can begin to look at things without the fears and emotions getting in the way.
mt: Supongo que mis hijos dirían que mi respuesta a todo es decirles que respiren, ¿sabes? Y, eh, también les digo que hagan una relajación muy simple si es necesario, y así, tal vez, puedas empezar a mirar otras cosas, pero para llegar a ese estado en el que puedas ver las cosas sin que las miedos y emociones te impidan.

src: erm I think it's really encouraged by the fact that the erm gipsy sites which one sees around the County at the present moment because there is very little control over them, are most unsightly and do considerable damage to the countryside, and people do not wish this to happen in their own area.
mt: "Supongo que se anima mucho por el hecho de que los sitios góticos que se ven alrededor del Condado en este momento, debido a la falta de control sobre ellos, son muy deslucidos y causan un daño considerable al campo, y las personas no quieren que esto suceda en su propio área."

src: All I was told is that you're getting twelve months guarantee, but you've got to have a three thousand mile service, and as the gentleman said erm I recorded the deliveries and sent them all back and on the third one, when I took it in I asked if they'd put a new set of points in for me and erm unfortunately when it came out there was no compression at all and because because I it was suggested that I dug my heels in a bit and got an independent report and erm basically they told me to get lost because it cost fifty pound to do the report.
mt: "Lo que me dijeron es que te dan una garantía de doce meses, pero tienes que tener un servicio de tres mil millas, y como dijo el caballero, registré las entregas y las devolví todas, y en el tercer envío, cuando lo llevé, le pregunté si me habían puesto un nuevo conjunto de puntos, y desafortunadamente, cuando lo sacaron, no había compresión en absoluto. Como se me sugirió que me aferrara un poco y obtuviera un informe independiente, y básicamente me dijeron que me fuera porque costaba cincuenta libras hacer el informe."

src: I mean if it were the case that we got on the way to establishing an appropriate atmosphere in the colleges, one where women felt comfortable and where they felt they could get the most from their educational experience, I think that would have profound impact on people's later lives.

src: Amongst smaller introduced animals are fire ants, which out-compete with the native ants (and which can cause uncomfortable nights for camping scientists); and cockroaches, which have been discovered on one or two islands and may have been transported inadvertently amongst supplies destined for scientists doing long-term research.
mt: "Entre las especies introducidas más pequeñas se encuentran hormigas de fuego, que compiten con las hormigas nativas (y que pueden causar noches incómodas para los científicos de campo) y cucarachas, que se han descubierto en una o dos islas y pueden haber sido transportadas inadvertidamente entre los suministros destinados a los científicos que realizan investigaciones a largo plazo."

src: For many years the station scientists did little research on these introduced species, probably because no one could foresee the possibility of eradicating them.

src: The next time you call at your local council offices to collect some forms for making a Building Regulations application, don't be surprised if you are asked, ‘What type of forms do you want — Full plans or Building Notice?’

src: Hence, an illusion that the children would sooner or later return home was sustained, mitigating the need to plan for another outcome which, in any case, was considered inferior and likely to do as much harm as good.

src: The concept that social intervention could have effects unintended by the practitioners, and which could be revealed only by asking the clients for their subjective impressions, took a long time to achieve currency, and had to do battle with the time-honoured attitude in professional practice that the client could not be expected to know what he, or more usually she, wanted.
mt: "La noción de que la intervención social podría tener efectos no intencionados por parte de los practicantes, y que solo se podrían revelar preguntando a los clientes sus impresiones subjetivas, tardó mucho tiempo en ganar aceptación, y tuvo que luchar contra la actitud tradicional en la práctica profesional que el cliente no podía ser esperado a conocer lo que él, o más comúnmente ella, quería."

src: In support of this contention he quotes research done by Thorpe, who found in a study of long-term foster-children that only 27 per cent had contact with their parents every six months or more frequently and that over 60 per cent of natural parents did not know where their children were living, with only 21 per cent feeling encouraged by their social worker to maintain contact.
mt: "En apoyo a esta afirmación, cita investigaciones realizadas por Thorpe, quien encontró en un estudio de niños de acogida a largo plazo que solo el 27 por ciento tenía contacto con sus padres cada seis meses o con más frecuencia, y que más del 60 por ciento de los padres biológicos no conocían dónde vivían sus hijos, con solo el 21 por ciento sintiéndose alentados por su trabajador social para mantener el contacto."

src: I am not going out of my mind, she thought, and if, at the moment, the outside world does not recognise me for what I am, my sister knows she has only to speak a word here and there, to take a decision, and who will listen to me?
